channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: From threats to civilization to a ceasefire: The week in Washington
item.description: President Trump made a dramatic shift on Iran this week as critics within his own party pushed back on the war.
item.content:encoded: President Trump made a dramatic shift on Iran this week as critics within his own party pushed back on the war.
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro

item.title: At 86, Ian McKellen is still taking on new projects like 'The Christophers'
item.description: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Sir Ian McKellen about playing a sour painter in The Christophers and why the 86-year-old actor hopes to never retire.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Sir Ian McKellen about playing a sour painter in The Christophers and why the 86-year-old actor hopes to never retire.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Handel

item.title: Vance heads to Pakistan to negotiate the end of the war in Iran
item.description: Vice President JD Vance faces a key moment in his career as he heads to Islamabad to negotiate the end of the U.S.-Israeli-led war in Iran.
item.content:encoded: Vice President JD Vance faces a key moment in his career as he heads to Islamabad to negotiate the end of the U.S.-Israeli-led war in Iran.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben

item.title: Country artist Ella Langley is breaking records with her album 'Dandelion'
item.description: With her authentic country sound and relatable lyrics, new star Ella Langley is breaking records with her new album, Dandelion.
item.content:encoded: With her authentic country sound and relatable lyrics, new star Ella Langley is breaking records with her new album, Dandelion.
item.dc:creator: Mia Venkat

item.title: Taiwan's opposition leader meets Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing
item.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping hosted the head of Taiwan's largest opposition party in Beijing on Friday — the first such meeting in nearly a decade.
item.content:encoded: Chinese leader Xi Jinping hosted the head of Taiwan's largest opposition party in Beijing on Friday — the first such meeting in nearly a decade.
item.dc:creator: Ashish Valentine

item.title: Monster truck rallies are more popular than ever
item.description: The spectacle of a mammoth, balloon-tired pickup truck hurtling through the air in front of thousands of screaming fans has turned into a multi-million-dollar business. Monster Trucks are bigger than ever, spawning several competing national touring companies and expanding overseas. What the hell's going on here? John Burnett will attend Monster Truck Wars--"America's Wildest Monster Truck Show"--in Henderson, Texas, on March 14, talk to some superfans and profile a driver.
item.content:encoded: The spectacle of a mammoth, balloon-tired pickup truck hurtling through the air in front of thousands of screaming fans has turned into a multi-million-dollar business. Monster Trucks are bigger than ever, spawning several competing national touring companies and expanding overseas. What the hell's going on here? John Burnett will attend Monster Truck Wars--"America's Wildest Monster Truck Show"--in Henderson, Texas, on March 14, talk to some superfans and profile a driver.
item.dc:creator: John Burnett

item.title: How northern Israel and Hezbollah factor into ceasefire talks
item.description: Northern Israeli communities want support from Netanyahu to not include the Lebanon war in the cease-fire talks with Iran. Many say they want Israel to finish the fight against Hezbollah militants.
item.content:encoded: Northern Israeli communities want support from Netanyahu to not include the Lebanon war in the cease-fire talks with Iran. Many say they want Israel to finish the fight against Hezbollah militants.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Kahn

item.title: After more than 9 days in flight, NASA's Artemis II is set to return to Earth
item.description: The four astronauts on NASA's Artemis II lunar mission are set to return to Earth Friday evening. The crew is wrapping up a journey around the moon with a planned splashdown off San Diego, Calif.
item.content:encoded: The four astronauts on NASA's Artemis II lunar mission are set to return to Earth Friday evening. The crew is wrapping up a journey around the moon with a planned splashdown off San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Nell Greenfieldboyce

item.title: Afrika Bambaataa, DJ and producer who pushed hip-hop forward, dies at 68
item.description: Afrika Bambaataa, a pioneer in hip-hop and electronic music in the 1970s and '80s, has died. Later in life, he was accused by several men of sexually abusing them when they were children.
item.content:encoded: Afrika Bambaataa, a pioneer in hip-hop and electronic music in the 1970s and '80s, has died. Later in life, he was accused by several men of sexually abusing them when they were children.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Gomez Sarmiento

item.title: From cheap eats to a prohibition on running, a look at the traditions of the Masters
item.description: The Masters, the famed golf tournament in Augusta, Georgia, is known for its beauty and traditions, from inexpensive food, a ban on cell phones and the winner's green jacket.
item.content:encoded: The Masters, the famed golf tournament in Augusta, Georgia, is known for its beauty and traditions, from inexpensive food, a ban on cell phones and the winner's green jacket.
item.dc:creator: Steve Futterman
